title: RoleTied
description: Simple bridge between DiscordSRV and LuckPerms
body:
Discord Role -> LuckPerms group. It's that simple.

In the config, define your mappings as "discordRoleId: luckPermsGroup". For example:


```
872223196687766003: mod
862940057519476622: admin
```


A player's LP groups will be re-assessed on each login.

If you don't wish for a role to have an LP group mapping, just don't include it.

Players will always get every LP group that they have a Discord role for, not just the highest permission group.

**Requires DiscordSRV and LuckPerms, of course.**
